message:
✨ Allow typing custom namespace in GPU reservation form (#874)

Replace the <select> dropdown with an <input> + <datalist> combo box
so users can either pick from existing namespaces or type a new one.
Shows a hint when a new namespace will be created. Fixes empty dropdown
on slow clusters where namespace loading times out.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
